meta.title: MediaShare - Fast and Secure File Sharing
meta.description: MediaShare helps you transfer files quickly and securely across iOS and Android devices.

hero.title: Your cross-device file sharing hub
hero.subtitle: MediaShare helps you move photos, videos, and documents across phones and tablets with speed and reliability.

screenshots.title: App Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: Real UI examples that highlight the core MediaShare experience.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Capabilities focused on transfer efficiency and data safety.

items.title: Fast Transfer
items.description: Optimized local-network transfer paths help large files move quickly.

items.title: Cross Platform
items.description: Built for both iOS and Android with a consistent sharing experience.

items.title: Secure by Design
items.description: Transfer checks and safeguards help protect your privacy and file integrity.

items.title: Offline Ready
items.description: Share through local networks even without external internet access.

items.title: Simple Workflow
items.description: Clear actions and feedback make the app easy to learn for new users.

items.title: Reliable Delivery
items.description: Retry and status feedback mechanisms provide a stable transfer process.

cta.title: Get started with MediaShare
cta.subtitle: Download now and enjoy simple, efficient file sharing.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: MediaShare values your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information.

sections.title: What We Collect
sections.content: We only collect information necessary to provide file transfer services, such as device identifiers, transfer logs, and diagnostics.

sections.title: How We Use Information
sections.content: Collected data is used to maintain transfer stability, improve product quality, and resolve issues. It is not used for unrelated purposes.

sections.title: Security Measures
sections.content: We apply encryption, access controls, and least-privilege principles to protect data from unauthorized access or tampering.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information through our support channels.

userPolicy.title: User Policy
userPolicy.intro: By using MediaShare, you agree to follow the rules below to protect users and maintain service reliability.

sections.title: Lawful Use
sections.content: You must not use the service to transfer illegal, infringing, malicious, or otherwise prohibited content.

sections.title: Account and Device Security
sections.content: You are responsible for securing your device and credentials. Loss caused by improper protection is your responsibility.

sections.title: Service Availability
sections.content: We strive for stable operation, but temporary interruptions may occur due to maintenance, upgrades, or force majeure.

sections.title: Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy to reflect product or regulatory changes, and updates will be published in the app or website.

support.title: Technical Support
support.intro: If you encounter issues while using MediaShare, contact us through the channels below.

sections.title: Support Email
sections.content: support@mediashare.app (please include your device model, OS version, and issue details).

sections.title: Response Time
sections.content: We usually respond within 1-3 business days. Complex cases may take longer to investigate.

sections.title: Quick Troubleshooting
sections.content: Ensure both devices are on the same local network, update to the latest app version, and retry after restarting the app.

sections.title: Issue Reporting
sections.content: If the issue persists, attach screenshots or logs so we can help diagnose it more effectively.
